profile.name: Michael David Lagos
profile.headline: Building Modern Software
about: I'm a Software Engineering student focused on designing and building reliable software. I enjoy turning ideas into practical applications while continuously improving my skills through academic and personal projects.

My interests include backend engineering, cloud technologies, software architecture, and AI. I value clean code, scalable solutions, and continuous learning by building projects that solve real-world problems.

research.narrative: I focus on building software that is reliable, scalable, and maintainable. My goal is to deepen my expertise in backend engineering, cloud technologies, and software architecture while applying AI to create practical solutions for real-world challenges.

focus.name: Backend Development
focus.description: Building secure and scalable APIs using modern frameworks and best practices.

focus.name: Cloud Computing
focus.description: Learning cloud-native technologies and designing resilient distributed systems.

focus.name: Software Architecture
focus.description: Designing maintainable applications with clean architecture and scalable patterns.

focus.name: Artificial Intelligence
focus.description: Exploring AI tools and intelligent systems to solve practical problems.

projects.name: Para Cálculo
projects.summary: A personal project built to support calculus practice and study, showing applied frontend fundamentals with React and TypeScript.

projects.name: Mentes Creativas
projects.summary: Collaboration built during software engineering coursework, focused on creativity and teamwork using React and JavaScript.

projects.name: Tinck Cash
projects.summary: Collaborative frontend exercise applying software design patterns and clean code structure with React and TypeScript.

footer: Building reliable software, one project at a time.
